AppDescription.message: Removes black bars from videos on ultrawide screens (21:9, 32:9, etc) everywhere, including YouTube, Netflix, Prime Video, etc.

ImproveUs.message: Please tell us how to improve over email

Off.description: Name of the mode when the extension is disabled and doesn't apply any transformations

PrivacyPolicyText.message: We value your privacy and honor the EU GDPR. Please review & accept our privacy policy to start using UltraWide Video.

ReviewUs.message: Please leave a review for UltraWide Video on the Chrome Web Store

Stretch.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets stretched horizontally to fill the video element and remove black bars

Zoom.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets zoomed (scaled up, vertically and horizontally) to fill the video element and remove black bars
